properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 14/19
GRENLAND SEA
NAVIGATION IS DANGEROUS DUE TO ROCKET CARRIER ELEMENTS FALL
DAILY 21 TO 24 FEB FROM 1645 TO 1800 UTC
IN ELLIPSE SHAPED AREA CENTRED 82-10.0N 00-36.0W
LARGE AXIS 199 MILES AND SMALL AXIS 35 MILES
AZIMUTH OF LARGE AXIS 291 DEGREES
